Staff of Forbidden Rites  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: 10
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 50
DMG: 25 Dmg Bonus: 168
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +9 HP: +50 MANA: +50 ENDUR: +50
Effect: Resurrection (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 6.5 Size: LARGE
Class: CLR PAL DRU SHM BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 45
[Adventure Merchants | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Where is Marcia Attamilgad?

Adventure Merchants


North Ro
Merchant Name Cost Faction TS Skill
Marcia Attamilgad [Rare Items] 110
Nobles

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
North Ro
Formerly dropped by Lady Vox. Replaced with Staff of Forbidden Rites.

Confirmation?
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2004 at 3:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788569702
2 posts
I have been killing Naggy/Vox with my monk, I am hoping one will drop but its more or less just fun, if anyone could confirm it still dropping though that would rule. I have heard that it doesnt drop anymore and I havnt heard of one dropping in over a year.
BTW Getting 3 rez sticks out of 8 spawns is just obsurd. It does not drop off naggy and never has, im pretty sure if this dropped 3 times you would remember to which mob it dropped off of since it sells on most servers for 25k a rez. I payed 250k for the one I have now and it was fully charged.
